metadata.notes: April 25 is a Saturday. Indian & European markets closed. US markets closed. All price data reflects Friday April 24, 2026 closing values unless noted.

upcoming_calendar_events.consensus_probability: Hold at current rate; ~15% chance of 25bps cut given oil shock and inflation concerns
upcoming_calendar_events.india_impact: HIGH — Fed decision drives USD/INR and FII equity flows; a hawkish hold could extend FII selling

upcoming_calendar_events.consensus_probability: Consensus ~1.8% annualized growth; downside risk from oil shock
upcoming_calendar_events.india_impact: MEDIUM — Weak US GDP could trigger risk-off, further FII selling from India

upcoming_calendar_events.consensus_probability: Repo rate currently 5.25%; market pricing ~50% chance of 25bps cut given crude oil risk to inflation
upcoming_calendar_events.india_impact: HIGH — Direct impact on bond yields, banking sector, and INR

upcoming_calendar_events.event: US-Iran Peace Talks (Pakistan-hosted round — canceled April 25)
upcoming_calendar_events.consensus_probability: Talks canceled; next round date unknown; ceasefire remains extended indefinitely
upcoming_calendar_events.india_impact: HIGH — Strait of Hormuz status directly drives crude prices and INR; Indian markets highly sensitive

upcoming_calendar_events.event: India Q4 FY26 Corporate Earnings Season (Ongoing)
upcoming_calendar_events.consensus_probability: IT sector guidance disappointed (Infosys -7%, HCLTech -5.8%); banking and pharma results pending
upcoming_calendar_events.india_impact: HIGH — Sector-specific sharp moves; IT sector already down 5%+ this week

upcoming_calendar_events.consensus_probability: Rate path depends on April meeting outcome and inflation data
upcoming_calendar_events.india_impact: MEDIUM — Influences global liquidity and FII flows

top_news_headlines.headline: Trump cancels Witkoff & Kushner Pakistan trip; US-Iran direct talks collapse on April 25
Brent crude above $104/bbl as Iran refuses to reopen Strait of Hormuz despite US ceasefire extension
Nifty 50 drops 1.14%, Sensex falls 1000 pts on Friday — third consecutive day of losses; IT sector plunges 5%+
JP Morgan downgrades Indian equities to Neutral from Overweight, citing high valuations and energy shock headwinds
S&P 500 and Nasdaq close at record highs on Friday, boosted by Intel +23% after strong earnings
FIIs continue net selling in India; ₹39,220 crore pulled from Indian equities in April 2026 MTD
Infosys down 7.1%, HCLTech down 5.8% after revenue guidance disappoints; TCS posts first annual revenue dip in 20 years
Bank of England warns global equity markets are overvalued and facing potential sharp correction
SEBI advisory panel recommends approving NSE co-location case settlement, removing key regulatory overhang
Iran seizes two ships in Strait of Hormuz; US Navy authorized to destroy vessels laying mines

iran_hormuz_status.latest_development: Trump extended ceasefire indefinitely on April 21 to allow Iran to unify around a proposal, but canceled Pakistan-hosted direct talks on April 25 after Iranian officials left Islamabad. Iran seized two ships in the Strait on April 22 and refuses to reopen the waterway despite the ceasefire, calling the US naval blockade a violation. Trump authorized the US Navy to destroy any vessel laying mines or disrupting passage. Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended 3 weeks.
iran_hormuz_status.crude_impact: Brent above $104/bbl (+~17% on the week as of April 25); major supply disruption from Middle Eastern producers; India's oil import bill materially elevated, pressuring INR and current account deficit
